name: cuopt
description: GPU-accelerated optimization with NVIDIA cuOpt — vehicle routing, linear programming, mixed-integer programming, and quadratic programming.

interface.shortDescription: GPU-accelerated optimization for routing, LP, MILP, and QP.
interface.longDescription: A curated plugin bundling verified NVIDIA cuOpt skills for vehicle routing (VRP, TSP, PDP), linear programming, mixed-integer programming, and quadratic programming — including formulation guidance, Python/C/CLI APIs, REST server deployment, installation, and contributor workflows.
defaultPrompt: Solve a linear or mixed-integer program with cuOpt.
Build a vehicle routing solution with cuOpt.
Deploy the cuOpt REST server and call it from Python.
